docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT; NOTICE OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT ISSUED FILED BY PLAINTIFF VEN COM GROUP, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT INFAC INDIA GROUP,LLC JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
